news.title: Worries about AI's risks to humanity loom over the trial pitting Musk against OpenAI
news.description: Questions about the dangers of artificial intelligence have been looming over the trial pitting Elon Musk against OpenAI CEO Sam Altman

news.title: Adobe partners with ChatGPT to bring marketing into conversational AI
news.description: Adobe and OpenAI have integrated GenStudio with ChatGPT. This allows brands to create and launch ads within AI conversations.

news.title: Anthropic Raises Claude Code Usage Limits, Credits New Deal With SpaceX

news.title: Arm forecasts higher-than-expected revenue on surging AI data center demand
news.description: Arm Holdings anticipates higher first-quarter revenue, boosted by strong demand for its AI chip technology. However, the company has not yet secured enough supplies for a new chip, raising concerns among analysts. Despite this, Arm's designs power most smartp…

news.title: Corning partners with Nvidia to expand US fiber optic output for AI growth
news.description: Corning and Nvidia are partnering to significantly boost U.S. production of optical connectivity products for AI data centers. This collaboration will tenfold Corning's optical connectivity manufacturing capacity and expand domestic fiber production by over 5…

news.title: Meet Mark Stevens: The billionaire VC, Nvidia board member, and Giving Pledge signer who just donated $200 million to USC
news.description: Billionaire venture capitalist Mark Stevens, an early Nvidia backer at Sequoia Capital, just made one of the largest gifts in USC history to fuel the university's AI ambitions.

news.title: ByteDance's Doubao tests paid AI tiers to challenge ChatGPT subscriptions

news.title: Micron launches 245TB 6600 ION SSD targeting AI data center density
